---
title: "Math 153 Project Proposal"
author: "Yatziri I. Carmona Ochoa & Alessandra Ela"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Project Proposal

```{r}
library(readr)
diabetic_data <- read.csv("diabetic_data.csv")
View(diabetic_data)
CDC_diabetes_data <- read.csv("diabetes_012_health_indicators_BRFSS2015.csv")
View(CDC_diabetes_data)
pima_diabetes_data <- read.csv("diabetes")
```
